bio: Business Analyst @ MetLife | Ex-Data Scientist | Building AI research tools, NLP systems, and data-driven products.
about: I enjoy building things that actually solve problems — whether that's an AI tool, a data pipeline, or an analytics dashboard. My background mixes Applied Statistics, Energy Engineering, and hands-on ML, and I've worked across startups, remote contracts, and enterprise teams. Outside of work, I'm usually tinkering with a side project or going down a rabbit hole on something new.

featured.name: Swiftor
featured.summary: AI platform for translating and transforming news content with hard/soft news formatting optimized for Bangladeshi Bengali audiences.

featured.name: Pixiva
featured.summary: AI-powered image enhancement platform for automating visual content generation and transformation for advertising and media production workflows.

featured.name: AR License Plate Detection
featured.summary: Computer vision system for real-time license plate detection and recognition. Delivered as a client project with NDA restrictions.

featured.name: Multi-Tool Research Bot
featured.summary: AI-powered research assistant integrating ArXiv papers, Wikipedia, web search, code analysis, and automatic file generation for comprehensive research workflows.

featured.name: YouTube QA Bot
featured.summary: AI-powered YouTube video analysis tool that indexes transcripts into a FAISS vector store for intelligent Q&A with timestamped source citations.

projects.name: LLM Benchmarking Research
projects.summary: Thesis project benchmarking local LLM agents (DeepSeek, Mistral, LLaMA3) for academic research tasks with FAISS vector storage and Ollama integration.

projects.name: PDF Chatbot (DeepSeek)
projects.summary: Interactive PDF analysis tool with AI chatbot capabilities, featuring table/image extraction and citation tracking.

projects.name: Agentic AI Chatbot
projects.summary: Enhanced conversational AI with advanced dialogue management, context retention, and multi-turn reasoning capabilities.

summary: Built a Python-based data validation tool that reduced a weeks-long manual process to a single day during an Informatica-to-Azure Synapse migration
Worked closely with Data Engineering, AI/ML, and Business teams using Agile methodology — running sprints, managing backlogs, and translating business needs into clear technical requirements
Contributed to the planning of an AI-powered product recommendation system and new features for the OneByMetLife app
Assisted in data quality checks and reporting across production dashboards and ETL pipelines
Built Swiftor, an AI platform for automated newspaper sub-editing, using OpenAI and rule-based agents with support for multiple user profiles and output styles
Developed a YOLO-based license plate detection model for Bengali plates and delivered it as a commercial product
Contributed to Pixiva, an AI video ad generation tool, automating the full script-to-video process using Veo 3 API and n8n workflows
Contributed to a proof-of-concept geospatial tax compliance dashboard for Bangladesh's National Board of Revenue
Delivered freelance ML projects for clients, including predictive models using ensemble and deep learning methods

experience.company: Radiant Data System · Envision Healthcare, USA
summary: Built Tableau dashboards and PostgreSQL queries to support operational, financial, and claims reporting for a US medical insurance pipeline
Analyzed insurance claims denial patterns by service type, treatment timeline, and payer to help the team improve revenue outcomes
Tracked physician usage of an AI medical scribe platform and reported on adoption trends
Built an internal AI assistant using RAG over Confluence documentation, allowing employees to get answers from company knowledge through simple conversation
Built a system that communicates with customers and books calendar appointments based on consultant availability
Set up a lead generation analytics pipeline connecting GA4, GTM, Firebase, and AWS to track and improve marketing performance
Built a self-serve GA4 dashboard to help the team monitor campaign results and make faster decisions
Led the full installation of a 62.1 kWp commercial solar system and carried out technical sizing and analysis for two additional projects using PVsyst, HOMER, and Excel
Built an automated financial modeling tool in Excel for cost and return analysis, replacing a slow manual process for each new proposal
Conducted ROI and cost-benefit analysis for renewable energy proposals to support business decisions
Researched hybrid microgrid and waste-to-energy systems alongside MSc thesis work, connecting academic study with real industry problems

research.title: RAG-Based Scholarly Assistant for Automated Research Paper Analysis and Multi-LLM Benchmarking
research.description: Published at IDAA 2025 (Atlantis Press, Springer Nature). Presents a RAG-based system for automated research paper analysis with multi-LLM benchmarking using DeepSeek, Mistral, and LLaMA3. Includes vector knowledge storage, citation network generation, and discussion summarization.

research.title: Integrated Machine Learning and Economic Risk Modeling for Reliability-Centered Asset Management in Electrical Distribution Networks
research.description: Under review at IEOM 2026. Applies ML and economic risk modeling to reliability-centered asset management in electrical distribution networks.

research.title: LLM Benchmarking for Academic Research Tasks
research.description: Master's thesis benchmarking local LLM agents (DeepSeek, Mistral, LLaMA3) on academic research tasks including literature review, summarization, and question answering — using FAISS vector storage and Ollama for local inference.

hobbies.name: Human Behaviour & Socio-Economics
hobbies.description: I'm fascinated by why people behave the way they do and how economic systems shape those behaviours. From social psychology to policy impact and global inequality — it's the kind of rabbit hole I happily fall into.

hobbies.name: Civilization & Predictive History
hobbies.description: History isn't just the past — it's a playbook. I'm drawn to understanding how civilizations rise and fall, and whether those patterns can help us predict where we're heading next.

hobbies.name: Travelling
hobbies.description: Every now and then I need to step away and just breathe — a quiet beach, a hilltop with a view, somewhere that has nothing to do with a screen. It's how I recharge.

hobbies.name: Predictive History
hobbies.description: I follow the idea that history isn't random — that patterns repeat and the future can, to some extent, be modelled. Inspired by Asimov's psycho-history, I'm drawn to channels and thinkers who ask: what do civilisations, geopolitics, and human behaviour tell us about where we're heading?
